name: Unified telemetry north-bound interface — one namespace, one clock

parameters.value: Redfish — DSP0266 v1.24.0, DMTF 2026.1 schema bundle (pin the tag, TEL-001)
D1 power island (bridged — new work) / D2 compute (native) / D3 cooling = CDU + TCS Tier-2 (bridged per Deschutes ref) / D4 facility / D5 external

Layer-1 controllers (EMCP/PowerCommand, relays, BESS PCS, CDU PLC, BMCs) keep deterministic control and safety authority; bridges translate only; layers 3–5 supervisory; telemetry loss never blocks protection
parameters.source: MGN-TEL-001 §3.2 / §13; Deschutes CDU rule extended platform-wide

parameters.value: P <20 ms local-only event capture / A 100 ms–1 s control / B 1–5 s supervisory (primary MetricReports, peak-dip interval capture per Sensor v1.12.0) / C 30–60 s contextual / D 1 min–1 h compliance to immutable historian
single PTP/NTP-disciplined clock — mandatory; method open (TEL-TIME)
Redundancy v1.7.0 MinNumNeededForFaultTolerance — gensets (4-of-5) and CDU pumps alike
every bridge endpoint passes Redfish Service/Protocol/Interop validators against 2026.1 + the site Interoperability Profile (TEL-PROFILE) before the AI layer trusts it
run-hours, NOx/CO/CO2/HCHO, DEF, fuel, energy per genset incl. standby fleet — hard requirement, immutable historian, defends the synthetic-minor permit
